Tab & TabListPrimitive

Pill-style tabs and tablist. Supports text and icon-only layouts, selected and unselected states, and single-select tablist behavior.

RestHoverSelectedDisabledFocused

Tab & TabList — Component Preview

Click tabs to toggle selection. Use Tab key for focus ring. Hover for hover state.
